member.summary: Pass - represented as 1 in Hry. Per Memory.

member.summary: Fail - represented as 0 in Hry. Per Memory.

member.summary: SuccessfulRepair - represented as P in Hry. Post Repair mode ONLY, per memory : y - > 1 = passRetest.

member.summary: FailRepair - represented as F in Hry. Post Repair mode ONLY, per memory : y - > 0 = failRetest.

member.summary: PatternMisprogram - represented as M in Hry. Applies to all Memories for all executions.

member.summary: ControllerFailure - represented as 8 in Hry. Applies to all Memories for all executions.
